sourcesContent:
import speaLogo from "../logo/SpeaLogo.svg";
import garminLogo from "../logo/GarminLogo.svg";
import satLogo from "../logo/SATLogo.svg";
import juventusLogo from "../logo/JuventusLogo.svg";
import politoLogo from "../logo/PolitoLogo.svg";
import harvardLogo from "../logo/HarvardLogo.svg";
import novamotumLogo from "../logo/NovaMotumLogo.svg";



const profileData = {
  name: "Giuseppe Pedone",
  role: "Research Engineer | AI Systems & Distributed Architectures",
  location: "Turin, Italy",
  email: "giuseppe.pedone.developer@gmail.com",
  phone: "+39 3711963527",
  orcid: "0000-0001-8920-9406",
  orcidLink: "https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8920-9406",
  cvFile: [
    { name: "Giuseppe Pedone CV", path: "/cv/cv_giuseppe_pedone.pdf" }
  ],
  publications: [
    {
      title: "A Real-Time Novelty Recognition Framework based on Machine Learning for Fault Detection",
      file: "/publications/novelty_detection.pdf",
      venue: "MDPI Algorithms, 2022"
    }
  ],

  companies: [
    {
        name: "SPEA S.p.A.",
        role: "Research Fellow – Predictive Maintenance Engineer",
        period: "Dec 2020 – Dec 2022",
        logo: speaLogo,
        link: "https://www.spea.com/"
    },
    {
        name: "Garmin",
        role: "Wearable Systems – Application Development",
        period: "Dec 2022 – Dec 2023",
        logo: garminLogo,
        link: "https://www.garmin.com/"
    },
    {
        name: "SAT",
        role: "Health & Wearable Software Collaboration",
        period: "Dec 2022 – Dec 2023",
        logo: satLogo,
        link: "https://www.satgroup.com/"
    },
    {
        name: "Juventus",
        role: "Health & Wearable Software Collaboration",
        period: "Dec 2022 – Dec 2023",
        logo: juventusLogo,
        link: "https://www.juventus.com/"
    },
    {
        name: "Polytechnic of Turin",
        role: "Research Fellow & Academic Projects",
        period: "Dec 2020 – Dec 2023",
        logo: politoLogo,
        link: "https://www.polito.it/"
    },
    {
        name: "Harvard University",
        role: "Academic Collaboration",
        period: "2021 – 2022",
        logo: harvardLogo,
        link: "https://www.harvard.edu/"
    },
    {
        name: "Novamotum",
        role: "Software Development Projects",
        period: "2022 – 2023",
        logo: novamotumLogo,
        link: "https://www.novamotum.com/"
    }
  ],

  summary: `
Research Engineer with strong background in Computer Engineering and applied research on intelligent systems,
distributed architectures, and embedded AI. Focused on anomaly detection, predictive maintenance,
AI integration into operating systems and system-level optimization.
  `,

  education: [
    { period: "2017 – 2020", title: "MSc Computer Engineering – Software and Digital Systems", institution: "Polytechnic of Turin" },
    { period: "2013 – 2017", title: "BSc Computer Engineering", institution: "Polytechnic of Turin" }
  ],

  researchInterests: [
    "Machine Learning for Cyber-Physical Systems",
    "Distributed & Real-Time AI Architectures",
    "Anomaly Detection & Predictive Maintenance",
    "Edge & Embedded Artificial Intelligence",
    "AI Integration into Operating Systems",
    "Adaptive & Self-Optimizing Software Systems"
  ],

  workTimeline: [
    { period: "Jan 2024 – Present", title: "IT Consultant (Self-Employed)", description: "End-to-end software solutions, AI/ML consulting, embedded and system-level projects." },
    { period: "Dec 2022 – Dec 2023", title: "Research Fellow – Health & Wearable Software Engineer", description: "Wearable systems, distributed sleep prediction, BLE, MQTT, MongoDB, real-time biomedical analytics." },
    { period: "Dec 2020 – Dec 2022", title: "Research Fellow – Predictive Maintenance Engineer", description: "Industry 4.0 AI solutions, novelty detection, real-time industrial pipelines." }
  ],

  contacts: {
    linkedin: "https://linkedin.com/in/giuseppe-pedone-a170921a6",
    github: "https://github.com/Unix69",
    telegram: "https://telegram.me/",
    gmail: "mailto:giuseppe.pedone.developer@gmail.com"
  }

  ,

  technologies: {
    languages: [
      "Assembly (x86, ARM v7/v8, Inline ASM)",
      "C (ANSI C99 / Embedded C)",
      "C++ (Legacy → Modern C++20/21)",
      "Bash / Unix Shell",
      "Python",
      "R",
      "MATLAB / Simulink",
      "JavaScript",
      "Node.js",
      "React.js",
      "PHP",
      "HTML5 / CSS",
      "C# (.NET Framework / .NET Core / WPF / WinForms)",
      "Java",
      "Kotlin",
      "Monkey C (Garmin SDK)",
      "MetaQuotes Language (MQL)"
    ],
    hardwarePlatforms: [
      "Arduino",
      "Raspberry Pi",
      "Nordic nRF Series (Nordic SDK)",
      "LPC Series (NXP Microcontrollers)",
      "x86 Architecture",
      "ARM v7 / ARM v8 Architecture",
      "Bare-metal / Microcontroller Boards",
      "Garmin Watches (Monkey C / Garmin SDK)"
    ],

    network: [
        "Flask / Django",
        "JSON",
        "Gunicorn / uWSGI",
        "REST API / Web API / Web Services",
        "UART / SPI",
        "BlueZ and Bluetooth BLE",
        "paho-mqtt / Mosquitto / RabbitMQ / ZeroMQ",
        "TCP/IP",
        "UDP",
        "Wifi 802.11a-be",
        "CAN",
        "SSL",
        "EBPF"
      ],

    hardTech: {

      aiMachineLearning: [
        "NumPy / SciPy / Pandas / statsmodels",
        "Scikit-learn / Matplotlib",
        "Hugging Face Transformers",
        "OpenAI API / Cohere / Ollama"
      ],
      gui: [
        "WPF and WinForms",
        "TKinter",
        "AndroidGUI",
        "WebGUI"
      ],
      
      webBackend: [
        "Flask / Django",
        "Gunicorn / uWSGI",
        "REST API / Web API / Web Services",
        "Windows Services",
        "JSON-based communication",
        "Node.js / PHP"
      ],

      systemLowLevel: [
        "Windows SDK",
        "Windows Services and DLL",
        "Linux System Calls / Shell & Bash",
        "Linux Kernel Development",
        "POSIX API",
        "Memory-mapped I/O",
        "Threading & IPC",
        "Make / CMake",
        "GCC / Clang / Arch64 and Cross-compiling toolchains",
        "Emu8086 / QEMU",
        "Valgrind / gdb / strace"
      ],

      

      databases: [
        "MongoDB / MySQL / SQLite / Oracle / MS SQL Server / Firebase"
      ]
    },


    // ---------------- SUPPORTING / TOOLING TECHNOLOGIES ----------------
    supportingTech: [
      "Git / Bitbucket / GitHub",
      "GitHub Actions / GitHub Pages",
      "Docker",
      "Doxygen",
      "Trello",
      "CI/CD Pipelines",
      "UML / ER",
      "VSCode / Visual Studio / Eclipse",
      "PyCharm / Jupiter and Anaconda"
    ]
  }

};

export default profileData;
